parameters.query: SELECT c.id as competitor_id, c.domain as competitor_domain, k.id as keyword_id, k.keyword FROM web_intel.competitors c CROSS JOIN web_intel.tracked_keywords k WHERE c.is_active = TRUE AND k.status = 'active' ORDER BY c.priority DESC, k.priority DESC LIMIT 200

parameters.columns: collected_date, competitor_id, competitor_domain, keyword_id, keyword, position, url, has_featured_snippet, has_local_pack
